name: How much is my on-the-job injury case worth in Utah?
description: Medical, lost wages, disability pay; third-party for full value.[6]

mainEntity.name: How much is my on-the-job injury case worth in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, lost wages, disability pay; third-party for full value.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value based on medical bills, lost wages, permanent disability rating, typically 66-2/3% of average weekly wage up to caps.[6] Death benefits for dependents. Key factors: (1) Temporary total disability pays during recovery; (2) Permanent partial based on impairment; (3) No pain/suffering in comp; (4) Third-party adds full damages. Get impairment rating from doctor; lawyer maximizes settlement. Comp limits but third-party unlocks more.[6]
